Json Decode Error when decoding: {
    "reasoning": "1. **Interface Analysis**: According to the `input_spec`, the module is `TopModule` with inputs `a, b, c, d` and outputs `out_sop, out_pos`. The `golden_testbench` instantiates `TopModule` with these exact port names. I will declare all ports as `logic` to ensure compatibility with SystemVerilog testbench practices. 2. **Reference Module Implementation**: I will implement `RefModule` within the testbench. The spec defines logic-1 for 2, 7, 15 and logic-0 for 0, 1, 4, 5, 6, 9, 10, 13, 14. For the 'don't care' values (3, 8, 11, 12), I will set them to 0 in the reference to provide a stable baseline for comparison. 3. **Testbench Improvement**: I will maintain the exact structure of the golden testbench, including the `stimulus_gen` and `stats` struct. To satisfy the requirements: I'll add a `first_mismatch_done` flag to print the details (inputs and expected vs actual outputs) only at the first instance of a mismatch. I will update the `final` block to display 'SIMULATION PASSED' if `stats1.errors` is 0, or the specific failure message if errors exist. 4. **Syntax Error Advice**: Always ensure that for every `begin` there is a matching `end`. When using `always @(posedge clk, negedge clk)`, ensure all signals being checked are driven by non-blocking assignments in the stimulus to avoid race conditions. Ensure that the `RefModule` and `TopModule` are instantiated with the correct port connections as defined in the testbench logic.",
    "interface": "module TopModule (\n    input  logic a,\n    input  logic b,\n    input  logic c,\n    input  logic d,\n    output logic out_sop,\n    output logic out_pos\n);",
    "testbench": "`timescale 1 ps/1 ps\n`define OK 12\n`define INCORRECT 13\n\nmodule stimulus_gen (\n\tinput clk,\n\toutput logic a, b, c, d,\n\toutput logic [511:0] wavedrom_title,\n\toutput logic wavedrom_enable,\n\tinput tb_match\n);\n\n\ttask wavedrom_start(input[511:0] title = \"\");\n\tendtask\n\t\n\ttask wavedrom_stop;\n\t\t#1;\n\tendtask\t\n\n\tbit fail = 0;\n\tbit fail1 = 0;\n\talways @(posedge clk, negedge clk)\n\t\tif (!tb_match)\n\t\t\tfail = 1;\n\n\tinitial begin\n\t\t@(posedge clk) {a,b,c,d} <= 0;\n\t\t@(posedge clk) {a,b,c,d} <= 1;\n\t\t@(posedge clk) {a,b,c,d} <= 2;\n\t\t@(posedge clk) {a,b,c,d} <= 4;\n\t\t@(posedge clk) {a,b,c,d} <= 5;\n\t\t@(posedge clk) {a,b,c,d} <= 6;\n\t\t@(posedge clk) {a,b,c,d} <= 7;\n\t\t@(posedge clk) {a,b,c,d} <= 9;\n\t\t@(posedge clk) {a,b,c,d} <= 10;\n\t\t@(posedge clk) {a,b,c,d} <= 13;\n\t\t@(posedge clk) {a,b,c,d} <= 14;\n\t\t@(posedge clk) {a,b,c,d} <= 15;\n\t\t@(posedge clk) fail1 = fail;\n\t\t\n\t\tfor (int i=0;i<16;i++)\n\t\t\t@(posedge clk)\n\t\t\t\t{a,b,c,d} <= i;\n\t\t\n\t\trepeat(50) @(posedge clk, negedge clk)\n\t\t\t{a,b,c,d} <= $random;\n\t\t\t\n\t\tif (fail && ~fail1)\n\t\t\t$display(\"Hint: Your circuit passes on the 12 required input combinations, but doesn't match the don't-care cases. Are you using minimal SOP and POS?\");\n\n\t\t$finish;\n\tend\n\t\nendmodule\n\nmodule RefModule (\n\tinput logic a, b, c, d,\n\toutput logic out_sop,\n\toutput logic out_pos\n);\n\talways_comb begin\n\t\tcase ({a,b,c,d})\n\t\t\t4'd2, 4'd7, 4'd15: begin out_sop = 1; out_pos = 1; end\n\t\t\t4'd0, 4'd1, 4'd4, 4'd5, 4'd6, 4'd9, 4'd10, 4'd13, 4'd14: begin out_sop = 0; out_pos = 0; end\n\t\t\tdefault: begin out_sop = 0; out_pos = 0; end\n\t\tendcase\n\tend\nendmodule\n\nmodule tb();\n\n\ttypedef struct packed {\n\t\tint errors;\n\t\tint errortime;\n\t\tint errors_out_sop;\n\t\tint errortime_out_sop;\n\t\tint errors_out_pos;\n\t\tint errortime_out_pos;\n\n\t\tint clocks;\n\t} stats;\n\t\n\tstats stats1;\n\t\n\twire[511:0] wavedrom_title;\n\twire wavedrom_enable;\n\tint wavedrom_hide_after_time;\n\t\n\treg clk=0;\n\tinitial forever\n\t\t#5 clk = ~clk;\n\n\tlogic a;\n\tlogic b;\n\tlogic c;\n\tlogic d;\n\tlogic out_sop_ref;\n\tlogic out_sop_dut;\n\tlogic out_pos_ref;\n\tlogic out_pos_dut;\n\n\tinitial begin \n\t\t$dumpfile(\"wave.vcd\");\n\t\t$dumpvars(1, stim1.clk, tb_mismatch ,a,b,c,d,out_sop_ref,out_sop_dut,out_pos_ref,out_pos_dut );\n\tend\n\n\twire tb_match;        // Verification\n\twire tb_mismatch = ~tb_match;\n\t\n\tstimulus_gen stim1 (\n\t\t.clk,\n\t\t.* ,\n\t\t.a,\n\t\t.b,\n\t\t.c,\n\t\t.d );\n\tRefModule good1 (\n\t\t.a,\n\t\t.b,\n\t\t.c,\n\t\t.d,\n\t\t.out_sop(out_sop_ref),\n\t\t.out_pos(out_pos_ref) );\n\t\t\n\tTopModule top_module1 (\n\t\t.a,\n\t\t.b,\n\t\t.c,\n\t\t.d,\n\t\t.out_sop(out_sop_dut),\n\t\t.out_pos(out_pos_dut) );\n\n\tbit strobe = 0;\n\ttask wait_for_end_of_timestep;\n\t\trepeat(5) begin\n\t\t\tstrobe <= !strobe;  // Try to delay until the very end of the time step.\n\t\t\t@(strobe);\n\t\tend;\n\tendtask\t\n\n\tassign tb_match = ( { out_sop_ref, out_pos_ref } === ( { out_sop_ref, out_pos_ref } ^ { out_sop_dut, out_pos_dut } ^ { out_sop_ref, out_pos_ref } ) );\n\n\tbit first_mismatch_printed = 0;\n\n\talways @(posedge clk, negedge clk) begin\n\n\t\tstats1.clocks++;\n\t\tif (!tb_match) begin\n\t\t\tif (stats1.errors == 0) stats1.errortime = $time;\n\t\t\tstats1.errors++;\n\t\t\tif (!first_mismatch_printed) begin\n\t\t\t\t$display(\"FIRST MISMATCH: a=%b, b=%b, c=%b, d=%b | expected out_sop=%b, got=%b, out_pos=%b, got=%b at time %0t\", \n\t\t\t\t\ta, b, c, d, out_sop_ref, out_sop_dut, out_pos_ref, out_pos_dut, $time);\n\t\t\t\tfirst_mismatch_printed = 1;\n\t\t\tend\n\t\tend;\n\n\t\tif (out_sop_ref !== ( out_sop_ref ^ out_sop_dut ^ out_sop_ref ))\n\t\tbegin \n\t\t\tif (stats1.errors_out_sop == 0) stats1.errortime_out_sop = $time;\n\t\t\tstats1.errors_out_sop = stats1.errors_out_sop+1'b1; \n\t\tend\n\n\t\tif (out_pos_ref !== ( out_pos_ref ^ out_pos_dut ^ out_pos_ref ))\n\t\tbegin \n\t\t\tif (stats1.errors_out_pos == 0) stats1.errortime_out_pos = $time;\n\t\t\tstats1.errors_out_pos = stats1.errors_out_pos+1'b1; \n\t\tend\n\n\tend\n\n   // add timeout after 100K cycles\n   initial begin\n     #1000000\n     $display(\"TIMEOUT\");\n     $finish();\n   end\n\n\tfinal begin\n\t\tif (stats1.errors == 0) begin\n\t\t\t$display(\"SIMULATION PASSED\");\n\t\tend else begin\n\t\t\t$display(\"SIMULATION FAILED - %0d MISMATCHES DETECTED, FIRST AT TIME %0d\", stats1.errors, stats1.errortime);\n\t\tend\n\n\t\tif (stats1.errors_out_sop) $display(\"Hint: Output '%s' has %0d mismatches. First mismatch occurred at time %0d.", "out_sop\", stats1.errors_out_sop, stats1.errortime_out_sop);\n\t\telse $display(\"Hint: Output '%s' has no mismatches.\", \"out_sop\");\n\t\tif (stats1.errors_out_pos) $display(\"Hint: Output '%s' has %0d mismatches. First mismatch occurred at time %0d.\", \"out_pos\", stats1.errors_out_pos, stats1.errortime_out_pos);\n\t\telse $display(\"Hint: Output '%s' has no mismatches.\", \"out_pos\");\n\n\t\t$display(\"Hint: Total mismatched samples is %1d out of %1d samples\\n\", stats1.errors, stats1.clocks);\n\t\t$display(\"Simulation finished at %0d ps\", $time);\n\t\t$display(\"Mismatches: %1d in %1d samples\", stats1.errors, stats1.clocks);\n\tend\n\nendmodule"
